name: Kreditbee
description:
KreditBee is an online personal loan app trusted by 100+ million users. Enjoy quick personal loans at attractive interest rates hassle-free. Apply for a quick online loan & get the amount directly in bank account. Whether salaried or self-employed, get easy funds anytime, anywhere. Also experience faster, secure and reliable UPI Payments at your fingertips.

● Online personal loans from ₹6,000 to ₹10,00,000 
● Interest rates - 12% to 28.5% p.a. 
● Tenures - 6 to 60 months
● APR range - 17% to 50% 
● Low transaction fees
● Quick loans & easy EMI

Why choose KreditBee?
● Quick online loan
● Low interest rates
● Easy application process
● Fast loan approval
● Seamless and reliable UPI Payments

👉 KreditBee UPI (NPCI approved)—Faster, reliable, & secure  payments!
✅ Setup UPI ID by linking your bank account with registered mobile number
✅ Shop online & offline seamlessly
✅ Send & receive money instantly

✨Features of KreditBee personal loan app
✔ Quick Approval – Get a personal loan approved in minutes on our loan app
✔ Flexible Repayment Options – Pay online loan within 6 to 60 months depending on eligibility
✔ Digital process – Enjoy hassle-free documentation with our online personal loan app. Submit documents online
✔ Full Transparency - No hidden costs
✔ Convenient – Get a quick personal loan anytime, anywhere
✔ Languages – English & Hindi

Why KreditBee?
Loan for All Purposes: Finance big purchases, short or long domestic/international trips, education, shopping, wedding expenses, & debt consolidation, emergency home repairs, or medical bills.
Flexible Interest Rates: From 12% to 28.5% per annum.
Security: Partnered only with RBI-certified NBFCs/Banks.

🤝 RBI-registered Lending Partners
Krazybee Services Pvt. Ltd.
PayU Finance India Pvt. Ltd.
Oxyzo Financial Services Ltd.
Vivriti Capital Pvt. Ltd.
Cholamandalam Investment and Finance Company Ltd.
Kisetsu Saison Finance (India) Pvt Ltd.
Tata Capital Ltd.
Northern Arc Capital Ltd.
Piramal Finance Ltd. (Formerly Piramal Capital & Housing Finance Ltd.)
MAS Financial Services Ltd.
Mirae Asset Financial Services (India) Pvt. Ltd.
Aditya Birla Capital Limited
* KreditBee is a loan facilitator platform connecting users with our RBI-registered NBFC partners & Banks.

Loans Types

👉 Personal Loan: Easy personal loans for salaried and self-employed individuals with flexible repayment terms of 6 to 60 months for a loan amount of  ₹6,000 to ₹10,00,000.  

👉 Business Loan: Business loans from ₹6,000 to ₹1 Crore with flexible tenures of 6 to 48 months. 

👉 Two-wheeler Loan: Get a loan up to ₹5,00,000 with flexible tenures of 6 to 60 months. 

👉 Loan Against Property: Use plot or property as collateral for up to ₹1 Crore. Repay over a period of upto 20 years with lower interest rates from 12%. Available in major cities across South India.  

📋 Personal Loan (Example)
Loan Amount: ₹1,00,000
Tenure: 18 months
Interest Rate: 23% p.a.
Processing Fee: ₹4,000 (4%)
Documentation Fees: ₹10
GST on Processing Fee: ₹720
Total Interest: ₹19,189
EMI: ₹6,621
APR: 29.66%
Amount Disbursed: ₹95,270
Total Repayment Amount: ₹1,19,189

📄Eligibility
a) Indian national
b) Over the age of 21
c) Steady monthly income

Steps to avail a loan
1. Install KreditBee app
2. Sign up using mobile number
3. Submit PAN number & check eligibility
4. Upload KYC docs & address proof to verify profile 
5. Choose amount & tenure
6. Provide bank A/C details
7. Disburse money into bank account 

Queries?
📧Mail: help@kreditbee.in
📱Call: 080-44292200/080-68534522
🏢Address: 4th Floor, Anjaneya Techno Park, No. 147, HAL Old Airport Road, ISRO Colony, Kodihalli, Bengaluru- 560008, Karnataka.

With KreditBee, you get a loan app, & financial companion. Our customer support team will assist you throughout your loan journey. Unlock possibilities with KreditBee!

name: Groww
description: Groww is India's No.1 Stock Broker 🏆, trusted by 4 Crore+ Indians. Open a free demat account and start investing & trading. 🚀Groww is your one app to invest & trade in: 👉Stocks 👉Mutual Funds 👉Futures and Options Trading (F&O) 👉Gold and Silver 👉Margin Trading Facility (MTF) 👉Commodity Derivatives: Gold, Silver, Crude Oil, Natural Gas and more 👉Exchange Traded Funds (ETFs) 👉IPO 👉Bonds 👉API Trading Reasons why Indians love investing on Groww 👉 Free demat account (Individual, HUF, Corporate) 👉 0 AMC & no hidden charges 👉 24*7 customer support ⭐Stocks, ETFs, IPO, MTF & Intraday Trading • Open a free demat & trading account in minutes • Buy & Sell stocks listed on NSE & BSE stock exchanges • Boost trades with up to 5X leverage on Intraday Trading • Auto-invest in Stocks & ETF with SIP • Buy up to 4X more stocks with MTF (Margin Trading Facility) • Explore fundamentals & financials of popular stocks like Angel One, 5Paisa Capital, Meesho, ICICI Pru, Vodafone Idea etc. • Apply for upcoming stock market IPOs • Trade using TradingView’s advanced charts • Set alerts to track stock price movements for trading & investing decisions • Trade smarter with Intraday Screener • Set Target & Stoploss both with OCO order for Intraday Trading • Get insights on your investing or trading portfolio’s performance, allocation, risk, dividends & XIRR with Portfolio Analysis ⭐Mutual Funds Investing • Invest in direct mutual funds with 0% commission • Estimate portfolio returns with SIP calculator • Track all your Mutual Funds investments in ONE place - Import & Redeem external funds easily • Save tax up to Rs.46,800 with Tax Saving Mutual Funds (ELSS funds) • Invest money via SIP or lumpsum in Mutual Funds offered by AMCs like Zerodha, SBI, Quant, Parag Parikh, Bandhan, HDFC, Motilal Oswal, Axis, ICICI Mutual Fund etc. • Switch from one fund to another within the same fund house, without having to redeem it ⭐Futures & Options Trading (F&O) • Track Indian & Global Indices like NIFTY, SENSEX, NASDAQ, GIFT NIFTY, NIFTY MIDCAP, NIFTY NEXT 50 etc to make informed trading calls • Trade better in Futures & Options with Safe Exit, Advanced Option Chain, Instant Pledge etc • Use advanced charts to invest smarter & make informed futures & options trading calls • Super-fast Options Trading with multiple indicators & live portfolio overview. • Place Basket Orders with convenience during option trading • Trade above freeze quantity in Options • Test your strategy with Payoff Graph & trade with confidence in futures & options • Exit your F&O positions instantly in a click with Fast Exit ⭐Commodity Derivatives Trading • Trade in Gold, Silver, Crude Oil, Natural Gas, Zinc, Aluminium & Copper • Trades executed in under 0.05 seconds for a smooth experience • Pledge your stock holdings to boost your margin and take larger positions Personal Loans • Tenure: 3 to 60 months • APR: 13-48% Registered NBFC (lenders) • Groww CreditServ Technology Private Limited Groww is acting as the DLA for the above lenders. Example: Tenure-12 months Rate of Interest-15% per annum Processing fee-₹1000 (2% inclusive GST) Total Interest-₹4156 EMI-₹4513 APR-18.89% Amount Disbursed-₹49000 Total repayment amount-₹54156 Groww Invest Tech Pvt Ltd SEBI Registration no: INZ000301838 Member Code: BSE-6699 NSE-90187, MCX- 57420 Segment/s: Cash & FNO (Equity & Commodity Derivatives) Privacy policy: https://groww.in/privacy-policy Groww’s registered office: Vaishnavi Tech Park, South Tower, 3rd floor, Sarjapur Main Road, Bengaluru, Karnataka-560103 Groww is India's No.1 Stock Broker in terms of active customers as per NSE data dated October 31, 2025.

name: Fi Money
description:
Take Control of Your Finances with Fi: Investing, Banking, and Beyond💸

Fi Money, working with Federal Bank, offers a complete platform for managing finances. It meets everyday banking needs and provides advanced investment options. Whether your goal is to open a savings account, invest in US stocks sitting in India, investigate mutual funds and systematic investment plans (SIPs), or enhance your UPI payment processes, Fi ensures a smooth and secure digital experience. Fi is the only financial app you need 💯 Why try Fi? ✓Money insured up to ₹5 lakh ✨ ✓Zero FOREX markup on select plans✅ ✓No hidden fees ⚖️ ✓Withdraw from any ATM 🏧 ✓24/7 customer support 📲 🔥 FEATURES 🔥 - Manage & Grow Your Wealth 📈 - Open a Federal Bank digital account in minutes - Invest in NSE/BSE-listed stocks, mutual funds & ETFs - Trade futures, options & intraday with advanced charts Banking Reimagined: Secure, Digital, and Effortless -Instant Account Opening⚡️: Open a Federal Bank savings account online in under 3 minutes with the Fi app. -Seamless UPI Payments: Fi facilitates instant UPI transfers and bill payments through a secure interface. -Smart Deposits and AutoSave: Reach your financial goals with Fi's Smart Deposit feature, offering flexible savings options tailored to your individual needs. -Debit Card Convenience: Fi provides a sleek Visa Platinum Debit Card with zero FOREX charges on select plans, giving you greater control over your spending, both domestically and internationally. Instantly freeze or unfreeze your card through the app for added security. -24/7 Customer Support: Have questions or need assistance? Fi offers round-the-clock customer support. Investing Made Easy: From Stocks to Mutual Funds Invest in US Stocks and ETFs: Fi, in partnership with Alpaca Securities LLC, provides access to US stocks and ETFs, including popular companies like Apple, Amazon, Tesla, and Google. Benefit from zero brokerage fees, zero withdrawal fees, and zero maintenance fees. Start small with fractional shares, allowing you to invest with as little as $10. Explore Indian Stock Markets (NSE/BSE): Invest in stocks listed on the National Stock Exchange (NSE) and Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE). Mutual Funds and SIPs Trade Futures and Options: For more experienced investors, Fi provides access to futures and options trading. Advanced Trading Tools: Fi equips investors with advanced charting capabilities, technical indicators, option chains, etc allowing you to do in-depth market analysis and take informed trading decisions. Personalized Financial Management Fi goes beyond basic banking and investing by offering personalized financial management tools to help you optimize your financial well-being. -FIT Rules: Set personalized financial rules to automate your savings and investments. -Smart Statements and Insights -Ask Fi: Your Finance Assistant: Have a question about your finances? Ask Fi, your intuitive finance assistant, for quick answers and helpful guidance. Security and Trust Fi prioritizes the security of your financial information and funds. -DICGC Insurance: Your funds in the Federal Bank savings account are insured up to ₹5 lakh by the Deposit Insurance and Credit Guarantee Corporation (DICGC). -Secure Transactions -Regulated Partners: Fi collaborates with regulated entities like Federal Bank and Alpaca Securities LLC, ensuring compliance with industry standards and regulations. Super-fast instant Personal Loans - Get Instant personal loan up to 10 Lakhs with interest rates starting from 1.2% per month - Money in your savings account in 5 mins - 100% digital process with no paperwork and no collateral - ZERO charges for pre-closure for select lenders - Powered by India’s trusted lending partners & regulated entities Contact Us: 6th Floor, Sattva Knowledge Court. Doddanakundi, Bengaluru. Karnataka 560048

name: Stashfin
description:
Stashfin is an online personal loan app trusted by over 4 Crore Indians.
 
Download the Stashfin loan app to enjoy instant personal loans at 0% interest-free period of up to 30 days. Apply for a quick online loan and get the amount directly into your bank account with minimal documentation and instant approval. With 10,000 crore+ already disbursed and 40M+ happy customers,Stashfin: Personal Loan, Bonds App is a one-stop destination for all your financial needs, from personal loans to insurance, bonds, bill payments, and credit reports, all in one app with a 100% secure digital process. 

Why choose Stashfin: Personal Loan, Bonds App?
1) Hassle-Free Instant Personal Loan
✅Get instant personal loan from ₹1,000 to ₹5,00,000
✅Interest-free period of up to 30 days
✅Pay interest only on the funds you use
✅Tenure: 3 months - 36 months
✅APR: 21% p.a. to 45% p.a

2) Investment in SEBI-regulated Corporate Bonds
✅Earn high returns of 14.5% p.a
✅Investments start with just ₹10,000
✅Interest is credited monthly to your bank account
✅Low volatility compared to the stock market

3) Insurance
Stashfin offers Wallet protect, Loan & EMI protect, Travel assist and many more. 

4) Credit Repair
Stashfin's Credit Repair helps you check your credit report, build your credit scores and improve your creditworthiness.

5) Vouchers
✅Get shopping vouchers from top e-commerce and retail platforms
✅Enjoy delicious treats with food dining and delivery vouchers
✅Access subscriptions and movie deals for endless fun

How does the Stashfin Loan App Work?
Download the Stashfin instant personal loan app and register with your phone number.
Fill in your details and upload verification documents.
Once verified, apply for a personal loan online of up to ₹ 5 lakh.
If the loan is approved, e-sign the loan agreement.
The approved amount will be disbursed to you within 5 minutes.

What Are the Eligibility Criteria to Apply for an Instant Personal Loan?
You should be:
✅An Indian Citizen
✅Above the age of 18
Documents Required for Instant Personal Loan-
✅Address Proof (Aadhaar Card/Voter ID/Passport/Driving License)
✅Identity Proof (PAN ID)
In some cases, you may also be asked for:
✅Bank Statement
✅ITR/ GST Paper

Enjoy a secure loan with Stashfin App, fortified with robust SSL encryption and strict adherence to RBI Guidelines. There are no hidden charges applicable anywhere. We ensure transparency with clear ROI calculations and the following sample EMI calculations on personal loans:
Loan Amount: ₹52903
Tenure: 18 months
Rate of Interest: 21% p.a
Transaction Fee: 2.15% (₹1137)
Platform Fee: 2.5% (₹1323)
GST on Transaction & Processing Fee: ₹443
Total Interest: ₹9227
EMI: ₹3452
Amount Disbursed: ₹50000
Total Repayment Amount: ₹62129

FAQs
Which loan apps offer the smallest processing time and clear repayment options?
Stashfin offers instant personal loans online within minutes and lists all of their repayment options clearly in the loan document.

How much personal loan can I get on a ₹40,000 salary?
Top personal loan apps like Stashfin offer loans of up to ₹500,000 depending on the applicant’s salary, debt-to-income ratio, credit score, and credit history.

How to check loan eligibility?
You can check your personal loan eligibility on the Stashfin app and website.

About Stashfin
Stashfin is a Digital Lending Application ("DLA") operated by EQX Analytics Private Limited. It acts as a Lending Service Provider ("LSP") for Akara Capital Advisors Private Limited, a Non-Banking Financial Company (NBFC) duly registered with the Reserve Bank of India (RBI).

Stashfin also serves as a facilitator for corporate bonds with SEBI-registered Online Bond Platform Providers (OBPPs), specifically GripInvest and Aspero.

Contact Us:
Mail: grievance.officer@stashfin.com 
Call: +91-9289108566 | 0124-6981222
Address: Unit Nos. 1801-1805,1806A,1806B,1807A, 1807B and 1815, 18th Floor, Magnum Global Park, Golf Course Ext Road, Sector 58, Gurgaon-122011, Haryana

name: Bachatt
description: Bachatt is a daily savings app, designed for the 30 crore+ underserved, self-employed segment of India. With Bachatt, you can save daily, weekly or monthly in safe and secure Mutual Funds, Gold, and Silver, offered by reputed financial institutions like SBI, ICICI, Axis, HDFC and others. From seamless daily UPI payments to smart investments and a handy Fixed Deposit calculator, Bachatt has you covered. Get better returns than traditional Fixed Deposits (FDs), with the flexibility of anytime withdrawal and no lock-in periods. 1. Daily UPI Savings Made Simple ✅ Daily savings from just ₹51 per day ✅ Get daily FD returns, without any lock-in or early withdrawal penalty ✅ Instant Withdrawal 24x7, even on market holidays ✅ UPI powered daily savings, autopay with Gpay, Paytm, PhonePe & Navi for Investing 2. Save in SEBI Regulated Gold & Silver Funds (New!) ✅ Invest in Gold and Silver mutual funds from leading institutions like ICICI, Axis, SBI, and others ✅ No GST: 0% GST. Save 3% GST usually paid on physical and other digital golds ✅ No Making Charges: Every rupee you save goes directly into your investment ✅ No Hidden Charges: Zero hidden fees or transaction costs ✅ Starts at ₹100: your Gold & Silver saving journey with just ₹100. 3. Smart Mutual Fund Investments ✅ Invest in low-risk liquid mutual funds of ICICI, SBI, Axis, HDFC etc. ✅ Get annual returns – often better than traditional FD ✅ Flexible SIP options: daily, weekly, or monthly ✅ Zero commission & low expense ratios for cost-effective investing ✅ Invest till 1:30 PM and get same-day units for better returns ✅ Seamlessly integrate with UPI payment apps like G Pay, PhonePe, Paytm 4. Access to Loans for Bachatt Customers Bachatt App provides access to personal loans through our RBI-registered NBFC partner. Customers can apply digitally through a simple process with flexible repayment options. Loan approval is subject to eligibility verification and underwriting by the lending partner. Important Disclosure Bachatt App is not a lender. Loans are disbursed and serviced by the RBI-registered NBFC mentioned below. Loan Fees & Charges • Processing Fee: 0% – 5% of the loan amount (plus applicable GST) • Bounced Charge: Nil • Prepayment Charges: Nil • Minimum APR: 12% per annum • Maximum APR: 40% per annum • Loan Tenure: 2 – 24 months • Applicable Fees: Processing fee only. No hidden charges. Representative Example • Loan Amount: ₹10,000 • Tenure: 12 months • Interest Rate: 24% per annum (compounded monthly) • Processing Fee: 2% of loan amount + 18% GST = ₹236 • Monthly EMI: ₹923 • Total Repayment Amount: ₹923 × 12 = ₹11,076 • Total Interest Payable: ₹1,076 • Total Cost of Loan (Interest + Processing Fee): ₹1,312 Note: The final loan amount, interest rate, APR, EMI, and charges may vary based on applicant eligibility, credit profile, and internal policies of the lending partner. Lending Partner Details Full Legal Name of Lending Entity: Salora Capital Limited Website: https://saloracapital.com RBI Registration Status: RBI Registered Non-Banking Financial Company (NBFC) CIN: U72900MH1999PLC122849 Registered Address: 103, Park Plaza Condominium, New Yari Road, Opp. Fishery Institute, Versova, Andheri-West, Mumbai City, Maharashtra – 400061 Grievance Redressal Contact Email: developer-external@bachatt.app Phone: +91 8920335565 Why Indians Choose Bachatt for Savings ✅ "0" AMC & No Hidden Charges ✅ 24x7 Customer Support ✅ Refer & Earn: Unlock exclusive rewards for every successful referral ✅ Trusted Partnerships: Your savings are secured in stable funds of SBI, ICICI, and Axis Bachatt (Trusave Fintech Private Limited) is a registered Mutual Fund Distributor with ARN 321640. Terms & Conditions - https://www.bachatt.app/policies/terms-and-conditions

name: Jar

The chart is automatically refreshed and the price is updated every minute. Easily check the Gold price today along with its purity. You can specifically check for a 1-gram Gold rate and 24KT Gold price today as well. Check the Gold Price and Start Saving Now. Buy-Sell Spread for Digital Gold is 2% - 3%. For more details: https://www.safegold.com/faq Digital Gold Partner: Digital Gold India Private Ltd (https://www.safegold.com) A representative example of Rs 100 Gold Purchase Transaction - Sample Gold Purchase Rate (per gram) = ₹ 6000 Value of gold to be bought = ₹ 97.09 Government GST Charges (3%) = ₹ 2.91 Amount to be paid = ₹ 100 Gold quantity to be bought (in grams) = (97.09 / 6000) = 0.0162 g Partner Registered NBFCs: Kisetsu Saison Finance (India) Private Limited: https://creditsaison.in/partnercontact Terms and Conditions: https://www.myjar.app/terms-and-conditions Privacy Policy: https://www.myjar.app/privacy-policy Personal Loan T&C (Available for selected users) • Minimum & maximum period for repayment - 3 to 60 months • Maximum Annual Percentage Rate (APR): 30% For a loan taken, the below charges are applicable: Annual Percentage Rate (APR): 30% Processing Fees (PF) : 1.5%- 3% (GST applicable) A representative example of total cost of loan, including principal & all applicable fees: (Applicable for all above lenders) Loan Amount/Principal: ₹50000 Tenure: 12 months Rate of Interest: 15% per annum Processing Fee: ₹1000 (2% inclusive GST) Total Interest: ₹4156 Equated Monthly Instalments (EMI): ₹4513 Annual Percentage Rate (APR): 18.89% Amount Disbursed: ₹49000 Total Repayment Amount: ₹54156 In Case of query, please contact us - Official Website: https://www.myjar.app/ Office Address: No. 752, Vasantham Building, 18th Main, 5th Cross Rd, 6th Block, Koramangala, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560095 WhatsApp Support: wa.me/916366693874 Email: info@changejar.in

name: Gullak
description:
Introducing Gullak: India’s #1 Gold Savings App ✨
The easiest, smartest, and most trusted way to Save in Gold digitally. Gullak provides you the easiest ways to accumulate gold with daily, weekly, or monthly SIP and one-time purchase options.

💰 Why Millions Choose Gullak

✅ Start saving in 24K Digital Gold from just ₹100
✅ Automate your gold savings with daily, weekly, or monthly SIPs
✅ Convert your digital gold into jewellery anytime at 5,000+ jewellery partner stores all across India
✅ Get 24K 99.9% pure gold coins delivered to your doorstep.

Your investments are always safe & secure 🔒

✅ 100% Pure Gold - 24K gold, hallmarked and 99.9% pure, provided by Augmont(one of India’s Biggest Gold refineries)
✅ Secure storage - Your 24K gold is stored in secure vaults that are insured
✅ No hidden charges or transaction fees charged by Gullak

👉 What are the different ways to invest in Digital gold on Gullak? 

✅ SIP in Gold - Gullak makes buying gold online highly accessible to all with features like daily, weekly or monthly SIPs. SIPs on Gullak start with just ₹100/day

✅ Save on every Spend: Every time you make an online transaction, we round off the amount to the nearest 10 & invest this into digital gold.

✅ Top-up: You can add a one-time lump sum amount on any given day into one of your Gullaks. Gullak provides the best deals on 24K gold investments.

👉 Here’s why this system matters:

Gold is not just an investment in India but it is also deeply rooted in the culture. Be it buying gold as a form of wealth creation, gifting to your parents, friends or partner or passing on wealth during your daughter’s marriage, gold is an integral part of our lives.

However, with the rising gold prices, buying in a go becomes difficult for most households, leading to last minute panic, compromising on the amount of gold you want to give or even as far as taking loans for buying gold. Gullak makes accumulating Gold extremely simple with its SIP approach. Once you’ve hit your target gold quantity, you can redeem as -

✨ Cash - Sell Gold at live gold selling price and withdraw the amount in rupees
✨ Gold coins - Gullak has a variety of gold coins starting from 0.1gms to 100 gms. You can order gold coins using your Gold savings. Gullak has some of the lowest making charges on gold coins in India
✨ Jewellery at top stores(most popular) - Gullak has partnered with most major jewellers in India. You can use your Gullak savings to redeem jewellery at jewellers like Tanishq, Malabar, Bhima, Caratlane, Kalyan and every other major player in India.

👉 FAQ’s
How do we ensure safety & security with Gullak?

Your investments are 100% safe and are always accounted for.
Gullak is partnered with one of India’s Biggest Gold refineries, Augmont. All the gold you buy on Gullak is bought from Augmont. Augmont is NABL and BIS accredited and a member of India Good Delivery standard on NSE, BSE and MCX. All gold is hallmarked by a government-approved hallmarking agency as per the BIS guidelines. Your gold is stored in secure vaults that are insured. You have the flexibility to withdraw anytime you want. Gullak is already trusted by 1Mn+ Indians as their Gold saving partner and is helping them accumulate gold with digital innovations.

Can I withdraw anytime I want?
Withdrawals are instant with Gullak. Within just 30 seconds, you’ll receive your money in your bank account.

👉 Contact us
You can reach out to us at support@gullak.money

name: FOLO

With FOLO, you can effortlessly organise, update, and securely share your NetWorth - all in one place. Gain a clear, complete view of your financial world and empower yourself and your loved ones to make confident decisions for a brighter future. Why FOLO? - All-in-One View: Access your full financial picture, including assets, liabilities, investments, insurance, and loans, on a user-friendly platform. - Share with Ease: Securely share your financial details with your family, ensuring they’re informed and supported when it matters most. - Plan for the Future: Take control of your finances today to create peace of mind for tomorrow. Who’s FOLO For? - Anyone who wants to track and manage their NetWorth effortlessly - Those seeking a better understanding of their financial standing. - Families planning for the future and ensuring loved ones are always informed. - Leaving a Legacy behind for frictionless transfer to their Loved ones. Whether you're searching for a "NetWorth tracker", "how to calculate my NetWorth", "personal finance tracker app", or "family financial organizer", FOLO offers a comprehensive, secure, and seamless solution. With FOLO, your financial world is simplified, secure, and shared responsibly. Appreciate your worth - because you and your loved ones deserve it. FOLO - Appreciate Your Worth Powered by Finuture Technologies Private Limited — a SEBI Registered entity

name: Niyo
description:
Niyo Card With Zero Forex Markup Charges
24-hour doorstep delivery | Assisted KYC verification
1M+ Customers | Works in 180+ Countries | UPI Payments

It is perfect for leisure & business travellers, as well as students studying abroad. Zero forex markup* Niyo cards are delivered in just 3-5 days, with an option of 24 hour delivery in select metros.  Niyo cards are better than regular prepaid travel forex cards for international travellers.

Why choose Niyo?

• Zero forex markup* on all international transactions: Save up to 5%
• Forex Cash at zero forex markup & free door delivery
• Niyo Express 24-hour card delivery: Assisted KYC at doorstep and instant card hand over & set-up 
• 1 free lounge access abroad each quarter# at 1300+ airports
• 1 free international ATM withdrawal each quarter#
• Add money in INR & use in 180+ countries
• Card delivery in 3-5 days
• Coins: Unique rewards program
• UPI payments with Niyo Pay
• ATM Locator to withdraw cash globally
• Currency Converter for live forex rates
• International eSIM with affordable plans in 120+ countries
• Flight bookings with zero convenience fee#
• Visa bookings at lowest market rate and full assistance
• Hotel bookings at exclusive properties at lowest rates
• Travel insurance with 99.9% instant policy assurance
• Utility Bill Payments with coin rewards
• 24/7 chat support irrespective of time zone

Niyo Express: Be travel ready in 24 hours!
With Niyo Express*, we send an expert to your doorstep for a quick, seamless KYC and card delivery, right from the comfort of your home. It’s fast, easy, and efficient!
✔️ Free doorstep KYC by an expert
✔️ Assisted card set-up to make it travel-ready
✔️ Premium support throughout
^Available in select cities

How to open a Niyo account if Niyo Express is not available in your city?

• Download the Niyo App
• Verify your Mobile Number and Email ID
• Verify your Passport & Aadhaar details
• Capture a quick selfie & enter your details
• Complete your 3-minute Video KYC
• Your Savings Account will be ready & card will be delivered in 3-5 days

The INR-based Niyo card takes away the need for a multi currency account & multi currency card. You can add money to your card in INR and transact in the currency of your destination abroad. Once you’re back in India, you can continue to use your card for domestic offline and online transactions. 

The Niyo Card is the only debit or credit card you will need to save up to 5% during your travels abroad.

Note: Niyo digital savings accounts and credit and debit cards are in partnership with DCB Bank and SBM Bank (India).

Download the app and experience the sheer brilliance of zero forex markup international debit & credit cards with Niyo!

*T&C apply
Got questions? Reach out to us at global@goniyo.com

name: Zenda
description:
zenda, an app for families, simplifies payment of tuition and school related services.

MAKE PAYMENTS CONVENIENTLY
With zenda, you can make fee payments, securely, from the comfort of your home or on-the-go. No more calling the school for dues or waiting in queues to make payments.

GET FLEXIBILITY IN MAKING PAYMENTS
Benefit from payment plans and pay in flexible monthly installments. Say goodbye to the financial stress of paying fees in bulk at the start of the term or academic year.

DISCOVER & PAY FOR SERVICES
With zenda’s Marketplace, you can discover and pay for all services offered by the school from trips to extracurricular activities and transport. All in one, easy to use, platform.

zenda is a members only app. To get access, please reach out to your school or zenda team by clicking on help in the app or by writing to us at help@zenda.com. We are around 24x7!

name: Olyv
description: Olyv (formerly SmartCoin): Your Smart Online Loan & Credit Score App Financial needs can arise anytime. And when they do, they demand speedy resolutions. Our online loan app Olyv, is designed to help you access instant personal loans online, check your credit score and stay on top of your credit health. Whether it's an emergency that needs instant attention or a planned expense, use our quick digital loan app to cover all your financial needs. Olyv is an easy-to-use instant personal loan app with which you can apply for a loan online, explore multiple quick digital loans, and get real-time insights into your credit health. Whether you’re looking for quick online personal loans, want to check your credit score, or understand your loan eligibility, Olyv simplifies every step of your financial journey. 🚀 Instant & Convenient Online Personal Loans Need funds urgently? Olyv is an online instant loan app that helps you get access to quick personal loans without complicated paperwork. As a low-interest loan app, Olyv ensures transparent terms and fast loan approvals. → Instant loan online amounts up to INR 5,00,000* → 100% paperless and fully digital loan process → RBI-registered lenders for safe borrowing → Flexible repayment options (Minimum period for repayment – 2 months, Maximum period for repayment – 24 months) → Competitive interest rates starting from 1.5% per month → APR range: 30% to 90% With our instant digital loan app, you can skip multiple branch visits and long waiting times. Instead, get instant personal loan approvals and experience a smooth online loan processing from anywhere. 📊 Track & Improve Your Credit Score Your credit score plays a crucial role in getting quick loan approvals and low interest rates. Olyv credit score app allows you to easily check your credit score, track changes, and understand factors affecting your credit profile. Use Olyv Plus & take your credit management to the next level! 📊 Credit reports – View your detailed credit history, repayment behaviour, and credit score trends. ✅ Fraud alerts – Get notified about suspicious activities that may impact your credit score. 💳 Loan overview – Monitor active personal loans, EMIs, and digital loans in one place. 💰 Smart Digital Gold Savings Beyond being just an instant personal loan app, Olyv also helps you build savings through digital gold investments. 💲 Start investing with as little as ₹10 ✅ Invest in 24K 99.9% pure digital gold 🔐 Secure storage in insured vaults 🔁 Buy or sell anytime at live market prices 📌 Example (Hypothetical Online Personal Loan Scenario): → Loan amount: ₹65,000 → Processing fee (3% of loan amount, including 18% GST): ₹2,301 → Total loan amount: ₹67,301 → Interest: 3% per month → Tenure: 9 months → EMI: ₹8,349 → Total amount to be paid: ₹75,132 → Total interest paid: ₹7,831 → Total cost of loan: ₹10,132 → APR (Annual Percentage Rate): 28.58% 🏦 Trusted Lending Partners Olyv works only with RBI-registered NBFCs and financial institutions to ensure a secure online loan application experience. 🌟 Why Choose Olyv For Your Personal Loan Needs? → Trusted by over 4 Crore users across India. → Secure and transparent online loan app. → Fast approvals for instant loans and personal loans. → Easy credit score tracking and insights. → Fully digital loan experience with minimal effort. 📞 Customer Support Need help? Our support team is always here to assist you. → Phone: +91-9148 380504 → Email: help@smartcoin.co.in → Address: SmartCoin Financials Pvt. Ltd., Indiqube Gamma, No.293/154/172, 2nd Floor, Outer Ring Road, Kadubeesanahalli, Bengaluru, Karnataka – 560103 *Terms & Conditions applicable. Olyv brings instant digital loans, consistent credit score tracking, and digital savings — all in one trusted online personal loan app.✨

name: StockGro
description:
🚀 Simplify Your Trading Journey with StockGro – Your All-in-One Stock Market Companion
Unlock smarter investing with StockGro, a powerful platform designed for traders and investors at every level. Experience intelligent insights with our new AI-powered trading tools that bring together expert research and AI stock analysis to help you make confident decisions in the market.
Whether you’re focused on intraday trading, BTST setups, or long-term investing, StockGro combines human expertise, AI investing, and real-time data to support every trading style.

💡 Why Choose StockGro?

✅ Comprehensive Strategies for Every Trader
 Explore equity, futures, and options with structured guidance and AI market insights that adapt to both short-term opportunities and long-term investing goals.
✅ Risk-Focused Recommendations

✅ Smart Portfolio Tracker
 Track and analyze your holdings effortlessly with an upgraded tracker powered by AI finance insights, giving you clear Buy–Sell–Hold signals.
✅ Instant Trade Alerts & Market Updates

✅ Continuous Learning

📊 Who Can Benefit?
👩‍💻 New Investors
 Understand market basics and learn how AI investing apps simplify analysis and decision-making.
📈 Active Traders
 Access daily intraday calls, BTST setups, and AI stock predictions that enhance your trading accuracy.
💼 Long-Term Investors
 Spot shares with growth potential through research enriched with AI stock market insights.
📊 Aspiring Professionals
 Test strategies with the support of AI trading platforms and guided analytics before investing real money.
📉 Options Traders
 Utilize AI trading signals and advisor insights to manage risk and trade confidently.

✨ Key Features
 📌 Intraday Screener – Find stocks showing strong momentum with advanced filters.
 📌 Real-Time Market Data – Stay updated with AI market insights, sector trends, and FII/DII flows.
 📌 Research & Analysis – Access in-depth studies enhanced with AI analytics.
 📌 Timely Exit Guidance – Receive alerts when it’s time to review or exit positions.
 📌 Seamless Communication – Stay informed through multiple channels for maximum convenience.

📥 Download StockGro and Take Charge of Your Financial Future
Join thousands of traders and investors who trust StockGro for reliable research, transparent analysis, and a supportive community. With the integration of AI trading capabilities, expert insights, and SEBI-registered analysts, you can now navigate markets with even greater confidence.
🎯 Start your journey to smarter, AI-assisted investing today—download StockGro and experience the future of trading made simple.

name: Dezerv
description:
Stop juggling multiple investment apps. Dezerv brings all your Mutual Funds, Stocks, NPS, FDs and other assets into a single, wealth dashboard. Get a real-time, unified view of your true wealth and move beyond basic tracking to portfolio review by being able to identify underperforming mutual funds and diversification risks.

Why choose Dezerv for Wealth Management?

✅ 360° Portfolio Tracker Tool
Consolidate and track your entire investment portfolio in one place. Whether it's stocks, mutual funds, or national pension scheme (NPS), Dezerv eliminates the need for complex spreadsheets. Gain complete clarity on your asset allocation with our wealth tracker.

✅ Deep-dive portfolio review & health check
Identify the "leaks" eating into your long-term investment returns. Our portfolio review helps you:
   ◦ Benchmark XIRR: Evaluate your mutual fund portfolio by benchmarking each fund against its relevant market benchmark.
   ◦  Identify Hidden Costs: Uncover high expense ratios (TER) and regular mutual fund commissions that eat into your wealth.
   ◦ Optimize Portfolio Health: Spot over-diversification and sector concentration

✅ Calculate your retirement age & corpus:
Do you have enough to retire early? Use our retirement calculator to determine your estimated retirement age and target corpus by factoring in your current investments, along with inputs like expenses and inflation.

✅ Expert - led wealth management:
Book a complimentary portfolio review call with an investment expert. Walk away with clear insights on your portfolio.

✅ Uncompromising Security & Trust
◦ Regulated: Fully licensed by SEBI, APMI, and AMFI.
◦ Bank-Grade Security: 256-bit AES encryption and ISO 27001 certified.
◦ Trusted by 6 Lakh+ Investors: Join India’s growing community of sophisticated wealth creators and smart investors.

name: PhonePe
description: PhonePe is a payments app that allows you to use BHIM UPI, your credit card & debit card or wallet to recharge your mobile phone, pay all your utility bills and to make instant payments at your favourite offline & online stores. You can also invest in mutual funds & buy insurance plans on PhonePe. Get Car & Bike Insurance on our app. Link your bank account on PhonePe and transfer money with BHIM UPI instantly! The PhonePe app is safe and secure, meets all your payment, investment, mutual funds, insurance & banking needs, and is much better than Internet banking. Things you can do on PhonePe (Phonepay) App: Money Transfer, UPI Payment, Bank Transfer - Money Transfer with BHIM UPI - Manage Multiple Bank Accounts– Check Account Balance, Save Beneficiaries across multiple bank accounts like SBI, HDFC, ICICI & 140+ banks. Make Online Payments - Make online payment on various shopping sites like Flipkart, Amazon, Myntra etc. - Pay for online food orders from Zomato, Swiggy etc. - Pay for online grocery orders from Bigbasket etc. - Pay online for travel booking from Makemytrip, Goibibo etc. Make Offline Payments - Scan & Pay via QR Code at local stores like kirana, food, medicines etc. Buy/Renew Insurance Policies with PhonePe Insurance App Health & Term Life Insurance - Compare/Buy Health & Term life Insurance with monthly premiums - Coverage for individuals, senior citizens & families Car & Two Wheeler Insurance - Browse & get India’s most popular bike & car insurance - Buy/renew your car & bike Insurance in less than 10 minutes Other Insurance - PA Insurance: Insure yourself against accidents & disablement - Travel Insurance: Get international travel insurance for business & leisure trips - Shop Insurance: Insure your shop against fire, theft, natural calamities and burglaries. PhonePe Lending Get pre-approved personal loans ready to be disbursed into your bank account through seamless & digital loan onboarding journey. Repayment Period: 6 - 36 Months Maximum APR: 30.39% Example: Loan Amount: ₹1,00,000 Tenure: 12 months Rate of Interest: 24.49% per annum Processing Fee: ₹2,500 (2.5%) GST on Processing Fee: ₹450 Total Interest: ₹13,756.27 EMI: ₹9,479.69 Maximum APR: 30.39% Amount Disbursed: ₹97,050 Total Repayment Amount: ₹1,13,756.27 We offer loans from some of India's biggest lenders - Aditya Birla, Piramal, IDFC First, L&T Finance, and Credit Saison India. Mutual Funds & Investments App - Liquid Funds: Get higher returns than savings bank - Tax-Saving Funds: save up to ₹46,800 in tax & grow your investment - Super Funds: Achieve financial goals with expert help on our app - Equity Funds: High growth products curated as per risk appetite - Debt Funds: Get stable returns for investments without any lock-in period - Hybrid Funds: Get a balance of growth & stability - Buy or Sell 24K Pure Gold: Assured 24K purity, build gold savings on our app Recharge Mobile, DTH - Recharge Prepaid Mobile Numbers like Jio, Vodafone, Airtel etc. - Recharge DTH like Tata Sky, Airtel Direct, Sun Direct, Videocon etc. Bill Payment - Pay Credit Card Bills - Pay Landline Bills - Pay Electricity Bills - Pay Water Bills - Pay Gas Bills - Pay Broadband Bills Buy PhonePe Gift Cards - Buy a PhonePe Gift Card for easy payments across 1 lakh+ leading offline & online outlets and across the PhonePe app. Manage your refunds - Manage & track refunds from your favorite shopping websites on PhonePe. For more details, Visit www.phonepe.com Permissions for App and reasons SMS: to verify Phone number for registration Location: a requirement by NPCI for UPI transactions Contacts: for phone numbers to send money to and numbers to recharge Camera: to scan QR code Storage: to store scanned QR code Accounts: to pre-populate email ID while signing up Call: to detect single vs dual sim & let user choose Microphone: to carry out KYC video verification

name: ET Money
description: ET Money: All Your Wealth. One Intelligent App ET Money helps you plan, invest, grow & manage your wealth, simply & intelligently. Millions of Indians use it to build long-term wealth across various investment products, including Mutual Funds, SIF, Fixed Deposits, NPS, Bonds, Smallcases, PMS, AIFs & more. It brings your plans, investments & insights together in one clean, powerful app. All wealth products in one place - Mutual Funds: Invest in the top mutual funds in India instantly. Start SIP or do a lumpsum effortlessly. No paperwork required. No demat account needed. - SIFs: Specialized Investment Funds use advanced strategies to adapt to changing markets & protect your capital. - Fixed Deposits: Get high-interest FDs from trusted names like Bajaj Finance, Shiram Finance & Survoday SF Bank. Insured up to ₹5 lakh by DICGC. - Bonds: Earn up to 11% fixed returns with SEBI-regulated, top-rated bonds. No lock-in. Sell anytime. - NPS: Build retirement savings with the world’s lowest-cost pension plan. Save up to ₹62,400 in taxes every year. - Smallcases: Invest in curated stock portfolios designed around themes & strategies for long-term growth. - PMS & AIFs: Access PMS & AIFs from India’s top fund managers. - Loans Against Mutual Funds: Get instant liquidity without selling your investments. Borrow in minutes, pay interest monthly & repay the principal at any time. - ET Money Cash: Get pre-approved personal loans instantly. No paperwork or collateral. - Insurance: Secure your life & health with curated, reliable plans that fit your wealth goals. Intelligent tools for smarter decisions Investor Personality: Understand your investing style & risk comfort through India’s most scientific assessment, built with behavioural experts. Align your decisions with who you truly are & stay confident through every market phase. Fund Report Card: Discover top funds with strong returns and downside protection, ranked by ET Money for true performance. Fund Verdict: Know instantly if a fund & the category are a good fit for you. Decided based on the risk taken by the fund & if it matches your risk tolerance. Also, get to know your ideal investment horizon & the best way to invest in it. ET Money Select: Get a personalised list of top mutual funds. Hand-picked after analysing millions of data points & mapped to your risk profile. Regularly reviewed to keep only the best aligned to you. Portfolio Health Check: Discover the true health of your portfolio. Get a score based on 100+ parameters — returns, risk, diversification & investing behaviour. See what’s working, what’s not & where to act. Portfolio Breakdown: See exactly where your money is invested across asset classes, sectors, companies, credit ratings & debt durations. Check if your diversification matches your plan. Portfolio Fix: Turn insights into action. Identify underperforming funds & get better, personalised replacements, so your portfolio always stays in top shape. Mutual Fund Strategies: Built to Keep You Ahead Expert-built, data-backed strategies personalised to your risk, goals & horizon. Diversified across assets & styles, rebalanced periodically & tracked with alerts, so you stay disciplined, confident & on course through every market phase. Ease, Convenience & Control - Track all your external mutual fund investments for free and view current & lifetime XIRR instantly. - Download ready-to-use capital gains statements for taxes, free & accurate. - Complete KYC instantly within the app. 100% paperless. - Invest without a demat account. Everything from discovery to tracking happens securely on ET Money. Why investors trust ET Money - Trusted by 1cr+ investors across India. - Part of the 360 ONE Wealth group, one of India’s largest wealth & asset managers. - Regulated by SEBI, RBI, PFRDA, and IRDAI.

name: BharatPe
description:
Introducing BharatPe for Business
BharatPe for Business is a comprehensive payment app allowing you to accept UPI and card payments from any app. A single QR code enables merchants to seamlessly accept payments from Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm, BHIM, Amazon UPI, and over 150 other banking apps. BharatSwipe supports both debit and credit card payments. Over 7 million merchants rely on BharatPe for Business for their payment solutions. Invest your earnings to earn up to 12% annual interest and obtain loans to grow your business at competitive low interest rates.
 
Accept all Types of Payment
BharatPe for Business enables you to accept payments from all major UPI apps like Paytm, PhonePe, and Google Pay without any fees. Additionally, customers can pay through multiple modes like Bank Account, RuPay Credit card and Wallet etc.
You can also withdraw money instantly and transfer it directly to your bank account.
Business Loans Made Easy
Expand your business with BharatPe's low-interest loans and a hassle-free, 100% online application process that requires no paperwork, collateral, or guarantees. Repay your loan effortlessly through Easy Daily Installments (EDI).
 
Loan Repayment Terms:
Repay in Easy Daily Installments (EDI).
Loan Tenure: 3 months to 15 months
Minimum Tenure: 3 months
Maximum Tenure: 15 months
 
Interest Rate - Annual Percentage Rate (APR):
APR is communicated on the BharatPe for Business App while taking a loan.
Ranges from 21% - 30%
Minimum APR: 21%
Maximum APR: 30%
Amount: Rs. 10,000 to Rs. 10,00,000
Processing fees: 0% to 2%
 
An example:
Loan Amount: Rs. 1,00,000
Tenure: 6 months
Interest Rate (APR): 24% per year
Repayment Amount: Rs. 1,12,000
Total Interest Payable: Rs. 100,000 x 24%/12*6 (6 months) = Rs. 12,000
Processing Fees (incl. GST): Rs. 2,000
Disbursed Amount: Rs. 100,000 (Loan Amount) - Rs. 2,000 (Processing Fees) = Rs. 98,000
Total Amount Payable: Rs. 1,12,000 (EDI of 722)
Total Cost of the Loan: Interest Amount + Processing Fees = Rs. 12,000 + Rs. 2,000 = Rs. 14,000
 
NBFC partners:
Loans are offered in collaboration with RBI-approved NBFCs, such as LendenClub (Innofin Solutions Private Limited), Liquiloans (NDX P2P Private Limited), Trillions (TRILLIONLOANS FINTECH PRIVATE LIMITED), ABFL (Aditya Birla Finance Limited), and Arthmate (Mamta Financing India Private Limited). The NBFC's sanction letter is displayed in the app and shared as a notification.
 
Earn up to 12%
Enjoy up to 12% interest on your BharatPe account balance, credited daily. Add funds or request withdrawals at your convenience, knowing your money is securely invested with our RBI-approved NBFC partners.
 
Permissions
Permissions such as Location and Contacts, are necessary to create your credit profile and provide loan offers. To review our privacy policy, please visit: Privacy Policy - BharatPe for Business
Please note that BharatPe for Business is the brand name of the application launched by Resillient Innovations Private Limited. BharatPe for Business is our developer name.
Contact Information:
+918882555444
hello@bharatpe.com
Home - BharatPe
Head Office:
Resilient Innovations Private Limited
Address: 7th and 12th Floor, Building No. 8 Block-C, Cyber City DLF City
Phase 2 Road, Gurugram, Haryana, 122008.

name: ZET
description: Increase Your Credit Score to 750+ | RuPay Credit Card for UPI | Cashback on 80+ Leading Brands |100% Guaranteed FD-Backed Approval Build your credit score, make UPI payments on a credit card, and get cashbacks & rewards; all in one simple & powerful app. ZET helps you start your credit score journey even without income proof or prior credit history. Trusted by 10 lakh+ Indians, ZET offers a secure way to build & improve your credit score. You simply have to use our RuPay UPI Credit Card for shopping to build a 750+ credit score! Book a Fixed Deposit starting from just ₹2,000 and get your ZET FD-backed RuPay Credit Card. Book an FD above ₹5,000 and get a physical ZET FD Credit Card at no cost! ZET FD Credit Card ZET offers a Fixed Deposit (FD) backed RuPay credit card where your FD acts as a security deposit, allowing you to access 90% of your FD amount as a credit limit, even if you have no credit score history at all!. Features of the ZET FD Credit Card 💸Minimum FD amount of ₹2000 🤑 Lifetime no-cost credit card with no annual or renewal fees 💯 No income proof or credit history needed 💰 Exclusive discounts & cashback on 80+ brands ✔️ 45-day interest-free credit period 💸 Earn up to 7% interest on your RBI-insured FD ZET UPI Pay using UPI directly from your ZET UPI Credit Card for daily expenses like groceries, bills, shopping, and travel. Also, earn a flat 2% cashback on every ZET UPI payment you make using the ZET FD/UPI Credit Card with an active ZET Plus subscription. Cashback & Rewards Make every payment more rewarding with ZET. Enjoy exciting offers like: ✅ 2%* cashback on ZET UPI payments with an active ZET Plus subscription (₹3/day) ✅ Up to 20% instant discount* on Swiggy, Zomato, BookMyShow, and Instamart ✅ Up to 15%* cashback on 80+ brands ✅5%* cashback on Amazon Pay & Flipkart vouchers Credit Builder Membership Take control of your credit journey with the ZET Credit Builder Membership at just ₹99 per month. Exclusive membership benefits include: → One-on-one consultation with credit score experts → Personalised video analysis of your credit report → Access to exclusive Credit Builder Loans → Guidance to improve your credit score faster Credit Builder Loans ZET also offers short-term credit builder loans ranging from ₹500 to ₹5000 at affordable interest rates (APR: 18%-36% p.a., Tenure: 3-6 months) to improve your credit score. This is perfect for people who are looking to add positive credit activity to their credit health. Hypothetical Loan Scenario: → Loan Amount: ₹500 → Tenure: 3 months → Interest Rate: 30% p.a. → Total Interest: ₹25 → EMI: ₹175 per month → Total Repayment: ₹525 Our Bank Partners → Indian Overseas Bank → DCB Bank → SBM Bank India Privacy & SMS Permission ZET requests SMS permission only for secure verification during SIM binding. → Only one SMS is sent during the verification process → We do not read or store your personal messages → Your data and privacy remain protected Our Banking Partners → Indian Overseas Bank → DCB Bank → SBM Bank India How Do We Use SMS Permission? → We send only one SMS during the SIM binding process → This is done with your consent → We do not read, store, or access your messages → No marketing messages are sent using this permission Download ZET Start Building Your Credit Score With Us Today! Need Help? Email: care@zetapp.in Phone: +91-9910992875 *T&C Apply

name: Oolka
description:
🚀 India’s 1st AI Credit Score LevelUp App - Built for Everyone
Confused by your credit score? Struggling with EMIs?
Oolka is your AI-powered credit partner - here to help you track, improve, and grow your credit score with confidence.

This isn’t just another dashboard. Oolka gives personalised, proactive insights tailored to your credit behaviour. It’s like talking to an expert, not toggling between tabs.

🔹 📊 Smarter Credit Score Tracking
✅ Check your credit score - anytime, for free
✅ Get personalised tips to improve and track your credit score
✅ Weekly AI powered insights to move closer to 800+ credit score

🔹 💳 Effortless EMI Management
✅ See all your loans & due dates in one place
✅ Get smart reminders before your EMI is due
✅ Avoid late fees & protect your credit score

🔹 💸 Instant, Secure Payments
✅ Pay EMIs across multiple lenders - from one app
✅ Oolka (by Sixdis Technologies Private Limited) facilitates bill payments through BBPS via our partnership with a BBPOU authorised by NPCI.
✅ Real-time confirmations & robust data protection

🔹 🎁 Rewards for Good Credit Behaviour
✅ You Pay on time → You earn cashback
✅ Your credit score increases → You earn cashback
✅ Build long-term credit strength, step by step

🔹 🔎 AI That Thinks Ahead for You
✅ AI-powered insights on what’s helping or hurting your credit score
✅ Get alerts before credit utilisation or EMI issues arise using our AI powered Credit Score App
✅ Take control before mistakes happen

✨ Oolka is more than a credit score app.
It’s your always-on, AI expert to credit wellness.
Whether you’re new to credit or aiming for improve credit scores, Oolka helps you LevelUp confidently, securely, and on your terms.

Secure. Rewarding. Built for India.

→ Our partner NBFCs

InCred Financial Services Limited (Formerly "KKR India Financial Services Limited")


→ Our partner Credit Card Issuer Banks
IDFC First Bank
Yes Bank
AU Small Finance Bank


→ What we offer for Loans
Min & Max Repayment Period - 3 months to 36 months
APR - 14% to 36%


→ What we offer for Credit Cards
Apply for Secured Cards issued by partners
Apply for Unsecured Cards issued by partners


→ Privacy Policy
https://oolka.in/privacy-policy


→ Sample Personal Loan Calculation
Let's say you borrow ₹6,30,000 for 36 months, then your:
Processing fee (2% of loan amount + 18 % GST) cost to: ₹ 14,868
Interest rate: 14.5% p.a. (on reducing principal balance interest calculation)
Your EMI will be: ₹ 21,685
Total amount to be paid: ₹ 21,685 x 36 = ₹ 7,80,668
Total interest paid: ₹ 1,50,668
Total cost of loan: ₹ 1,50,668 + ₹ 14,868 = ₹ 1,65,536
APR (Annual Percentage Rate): 17.45%


→ Eligibility for Personal Loan
Age: 21-55 years
Minimum in-hand monthly salary requirement: ₹25000 and above
Should be a resident of India


→ Eligibility for Credit Cards
Age - 21 to 65 years
Should be a resident of India
Minimum in-hand monthly salary requirement: ₹25000 and above


→ Oolka supports these loan EMI payments
We support loans disbursed by Krazybee Services Private Limited, Bajaj Finance Limited, Snapmint Financial Services Pvt Ltd, Navi Finserv Limited, Muthoot Finance Limited, Speel Finance Company Pvt Ltd, DMI Finance Private Limited, Shriram Finance Limited, Tata Capital Ltd, etc.
We support all loans payable via the Bharat Connect ecosystem.


Reach out to us:
✉️ help@oolka.in | ☎️ 011-40846061

name: Pine Labs
description: Empowered by the trust of over 2.5 lakh merchants, Pine Labs is proud to present its latest tool to manage and grow your business. Introducing Pine Labs One - our one-stop app-based solution that lets you oversee all transactions, settlements and support concerning your business. This app empowers merchants, businesses and shop owners with all that's needed to track and manage transactions. Pine Labs One also offers exciting credit options to help your business grow uninterrupted. Easy sign-in Signing in is quick and simple, using just your phone number and password. If you are an existing myPlutus user, your existing login credentials will work on Pine Labs One. You can also secure the app with your fingerprint lock. All-new interactive app With Pine Labs One, nothing is more than 2 clicks away. The app is super-convenient to use. It ensures seamless user experience and provides easy navigation. Quick support Get all your queries answered with Pine Labs One. Our tutorial videos and FAQs are here to guide you. You can also raise a support ticket and track all your support tickets together. No more waiting in call-centre queues. Transactions, settlements and refunds Track transactions (near real-time), settlements (across payment modes) and refunds (UPI only) from your Pine Labs terminal and AllTap, all in one place. Easy User management Adding new users for your stores is super easy in Pine Labs One. You and other admins can create role hierarchies (city, zonal etc.) and limit access to features based on the requirement. Secured with OTP The app comes with enhanced security for sensitive flows involving your money movement. OTP-based authorisation is required to initiate refunds and avail credit facilities. Enable and track brand EMI Your customers can now avail no/low cost EMIs across 4+ categories, and 50+ brands through Pine Labs terminal. You can enable brand EMI for the terminal and track the requests in the Pine Labs One app. Credit facility Avail overdraft revolving facilities from partner banks/NBFCs through a simple digital loan. Access money easily to run your daily business operations up to ₹10 Lacs. Multilingual support The app is currently available in English and Hindi. Watch out for more upcoming vernacular options. We’re always here to improve and help you manage your business, easier and smarter. Be sure to stay updated with new releases as we grow and expand our app features to serve you better.
